'''鈭歫-p-p-b''' ('''kajappeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:valourize|valourize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-p-p-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:valourize|valourize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-p-p-b
|-
! Lemma
| kajappeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijapeboko|thijapeboko]] || [[word:jijapeboko|jijapeboko]] || [[word:shijapeboko|shijapeboko]] || [[word:kijapeboko|kijapeboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujapeboko|thuthujapeboko]] || [[word:jujujapeboko|jujujapeboko]] || [[word:shushujapeboko|shushujapeboko]] || [[word:kukujapeboko|kukujapeboko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojapeboko|thothojapeboko]] || [[word:jojojapeboko|jojojapeboko]] || [[word:shoshojapeboko|shoshojapeboko]] || [[word:kokojapeboko|kokojapeboko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojapeboko|thojapeboko]] || [[word:jojapeboko|jojapeboko]] || [[word:shojapeboko|shojapeboko]] || [[word:kojapeboko|kojapeboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙japeboko|th忙japeboko]] || [[word:j忙japeboko|j忙japeboko]] || [[word:sh忙japeboko|sh忙japeboko]] || [[word:k忙japeboko|k忙japeboko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajapeboko|thajapeboko]] || [[word:jajapeboko|jajapeboko]] || [[word:shajapeboko|shajapeboko]] || [[word:kajapeboko|kajapeboko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
